title: blepharis calcitrapa
intro: Blepharis calcitrapa, also known as the 'Coral Plant', is a perennial herb belonging to the family Acanthaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as acne and eczema. Blepharis calcitrapa is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its potential health benefits.
